bug_description: The bucket assignment `int((v - min_val) / width)` can return exactly `n_buckets` when `v == max_val` and the floating-point division yields a clean integer. The clamp `if bucket >= n_buckets: bucket = n_buckets - 1` is missing, so the maximum value is assigned to an out-of-bounds bucket index equal to `n_buckets`, causing downstream IndexError or incorrect bucket assignment.
